Agency Signature

Terms & Conditions

  1. The vehicle shall be returned in the same condition as received, normal wear and tear excepted.
  2. The customer is responsible for all traffic violations incurred during the rental period.
  3. Fuel charges apply if the vehicle is returned with less fuel than at pickup.
  4. Late returns will incur additional daily charges as specified in this contract.
  5. The deposit will be refunded upon satisfactory return of the vehicle.
  6. Insurance coverage is as specified in the attached insurance certificate.
  7. This contract is governed by Moroccan law.
